task_completion.description: The agent opens and reads the client formatting instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/alignment_instructions.txt'.

task_completion.description: The agent views the draft MNDA document in Calligra Words.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calligra Words application window is active and displaying the 'bilingual_mnda.odt' document.

task_completion.description: The agent sets up a side-by-side layout structure in the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen inserting a table, configuring page columns, or setting up a side-by-side structural element within Calligra Words.

task_completion.description: The bilingual text is aligned in a professional side-by-side format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document content in Calligra Words clearly shows the two languages positioned side-by-side (e.g., left and right columns or table cells) corresponding to each other.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the modified document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicking the 'Save' icon, selecting 'File > Save' from the menu, or a visual indicator that the document has been saved in Calligra Words.

integrity.description: The agent used the Calligra Words GUI to perform the formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Formatting actions and text manipulation are visible within the Calligra Words interface, rather than being done via command-line tools or alternative word processors.

integrity.description: The side-by-side layout uses actual document structural features.
integrity.visual_evidence: Table borders, column markers, or layout properties are visible in Calligra Words, rather than the agent just using multiple spaces or tabs to visually separate the text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to directly modify the .odt file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like 'unzip', 'sed', or python scripts being used to modify the underlying XML of the .odt file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document to be edited is located at /home/ga/Documents/bilingual_mnda.odt. The formatting instructions are located at /home/ga/Desktop/alignment_instructions.txt. The task requires the agent to use Calligra Words to transform the document into a side-by-side format and save the changes.
